content.rendered:
Gather and monitor reviews with RatingE Review Management Software. Customers hold the innate power to make or break a business with their online ratings and reviews. Leverage customer reviews and provide excellent support to roll in positive reviews and enhance customer loyalty. With our Reputation Management Tool, you can automate review requests and efficiently manage responses across various channels, making it suitable for businesses of all sizes.
Get A Free Trial
Book A Demo

Collect Online Reviews Easily: Strengthen Your Brand Digitally

Manage reviews to convert negative sentiments into positive interactions

Email Requests

Automate review requests to be sent out soon after purchase or on a weekly basis.

Text Requests

Land right into customer phones with SMS/ Text review requests for a faster response rate.

Scannable QR Code

Collect instant reviews with in-store QR codes for direct customers.

Whatsapp Requests

Maintain quick and effortless communication with clients through WhatsApp review requests.

Video Testimonials

Encourage customers to send video testimonials to be incorporated directly into your website or social media.

Asking for reviews can be surprisingly challenging, even when you have delivered exceptional service. Let us make it easy to request feedback without coming across as pushy.

Our structured review collection process prevents valuable feedback opportunities from slipping through the cracks. Here is how our automated review collection system works:

  1. The automated system sends review requests after a transaction.
  2. Guide them to post reviews on platforms like Google, TripAdvisor, YELP, and more.
  3. Every review goes through our Feedback Filter, which helps you manage negative ones and highlight positive reviews.


With RatingE’s structured review collection process, you can capture every review, build trust and credibility with positive reviews, and improve from constructive feedback.

Plans & Pricing
Explore The Benefits

60% of consumers consider skipping a business due to the negative reviews. Source: Reputation Management Statistics.

People with a bad experience are twice as likely to leave a negative review compared to those who leave a positive review. This might leave your business profiles with a disproportionately high number of negative reviews.

The RatingE reputation management solution captures every review in a secure feedback system. You can address concerns and provide effective resolutions without impacting your online ratings. By automating the review collection process, you get to grab maximum positive feedbacks while effectively managing negative reviews. We help you build a powerful collection of online reviews for your business.

Coming soon: Brand Mention Alerts! Stay updated whenever your brand is mentioned online—boost your reputation in real time!

Tired of displaying the same old reviews every time?
Ready to highlight fresh customer experiences? RatingE website widget helps you showcase dynamic and newest customer testimonials on your websites and landing pages.


Embed text and video reviews without the hassle of complicated coding or testing on various devices. Copy and paste the HTML code and follow the instructions to show your reviews seamlessly on any device- desktop, laptop, or mobile. No technical knowledge is needed- just simple, universal review integration.

Start Free Trial
RatingE is an online review management tool designed to improve your business reputation by putting your review collection process on autopilot mode and helping you manage it effectively. The system simplifies the process of gathering, storing, managing, and sharing customer testimonials.
  • Works for any type of business.
  • Get reviews from an array of review platforms.
  • Increase your review count, get 2X more reviews.
  • Never miss a positive rating opportunity.
  • 24/7 support.
  • No hidden costs.

Gather all your online reviews into one place, respond to positive reviews, handle negative feedback, and share your reviews on your website or social media.
With the soaring competition to be on the top of search results, positive reviews are your gateway to gaining customer confidence.
Present Social Proof Online reviews help establish trust. It evokes confidence in your business and proves that you deliver on your promises.

Increase Ranking Review ratings are a top criterion for search engines to rank your business. With high quality and quantity of feedback, your business shows up at the top of search results.

Quick Respond To Reviews 88% of consumers are likelier to use a business that responds to positive and negative reviews.
Use our Review Collection QR codes at your store or on your marketing materials to encourage customers to leave quick reviews.
  • The instant review collection tool can increase your feedback response volume and help build stronger customer relationships.
  • You can send customers to a custom-branded landing page with review platform options for a tailored experience.
  • Turn reviews into lasting relationships by offering exclusive discounts, coupon codes, or loyalty rewards.
  • Integrate remarketing strategies through QR codes to maintain customer loyalty. The better your offer, the greater will be the response

RatingE review collection/ landing page supports multiple languages, making the system suitable for multinational companies.
  1. Customer scans the QR code: Businesses can display the QR code at the checkout desk, receipt, packaging, or marketing materials.
  2. Redirected to a check-in page: Customer is redirected to a fully customized brand-aligned landing page where they can start the review process.
  3. Enters details and submit the review: The customer can choose the desired platform (Google, Yelp, Facebook, Trustpilot etc), enter the email and rate their experience.
  4. Receives a thank you message & incentive: On submitting the review, the customer receives a thank you message with a discount coupon, loyalty points, or special offer to encourage repeat business.
  5. Automated follow-ups: If the customer doesn’t complete the review process, automated reminders are sent out by RatingE to nudge them to finish the review submission process.
RatingE automatically sends review requests via email or phone number. You can specify the workflow and its frequency. The system follows up with customers who started but didn’t complete their review, as well as those who haven’t left feedback but whose details are available.

You can send unlimited requests without any additional charges. RatingE presents affordable and flexible plans with additional features tailored to suit the business size and needs. Grow your online reputation effortlessly.
With an automated review collection system, we help you streamline your review collection process. Accelerate your digital presence effortlessly with our user-friendly tool, offered in straightforward and budget-friendly plans.
  • Dashboard to Manage All Reviews: Track, analyze, and respond to reviews from the centralized RatingE dashboard without juggling through multiple review platforms.
  • Optimize Your Google Business Profile: Improve your Google review rating with increased review volume and positive reviews. Drive more traffic.
  • Inspire Trust with Video Testimonials: Bring customer stories to life with engaging video reviews and share these on your website & social platforms.
  • Increase Review Volume with QR Codes: Scannable QR codes allow customers to leave quick reviews. Capture every positive review.
  • Share Reviews To Social Pages: Flaunt your best reviews across social media platforms. Turn glowing reviews into powerful marketing assets.
  • Showcase Reviews Through Website Widget: Dynamically display testimonials on your website with the customizable widget.
  • Grab Reviews With SMS Requests: Simplify the review collection process with polite and timely SMS review requests.
  • Effectively Manage Negative Reviews: The Feedback Filter system allows you to address negative feedback and resolve issues before they impact your digital reputation.
  • Boost SEO Ranking: Use the review widget on the website as a trust badge. Build trust to drive traffic and sales.
  • Reply to Review with AI: With all reviews on a central location, be notified when you receive a review and reply instantly with AI.

Isn’t it great that you found us? Act Now and stay a step above your competitors. 

Sign up for a FREE TRIAL or BOOK A DEMO to analyze how the system can benefit your business. 

We offer Free Expert Consultation during setup to ensure that you get the maximum benefit through the RatingE review management solution. 

For urgent help

+91 7470111222

Mail us 24/7

Contact@ratinge.com

RatingE offers more than just review collection. You can manage your reviews, respond to feedback, publish content on your website, and share updates on social media, along with various other actions that can enhance your online reputation.

Trust and clarity are our core values at RatingE, ensuring your smooth and hassle-free experience. Find answers to some of the common questions we receive. 

Reach out to us to us if you do not find your query answered here. Our support team is always ready to extend any necessary support.  Feel free to reach out with any additional questions!

What is RatingE?

RatingE all-in-one review management solution makes it easy to get reviews. We automate your review collection and follow-up process so that you can focus on your business. The AI-powered system simplifies the process of gathering, storing, and publishing customer feedback.

How does RatingE Automation work?

Once set up, the system automatically sends review requests via email, SMS, or custom channels and even automates follow-ups to capture every potential review. You can also set up custom workflows.

Can I customize the review collection process?

Yes, you can customize the landing page to suit your brand theme. From customized request templates to choosing the review platforms, branded review pages, and custom follow-up actions, you can tailor the whole experience.

Which platforms does RatingE connect to?

You can collect reviews on various platforms like Google, Facebook, Trustpilot, YellowPages, TrustMate.io, and Glassdoor. The customer can also submit video testimonials through the system.

Where shall I show reviews on my website?

Using the customizable website widget, you can showcase your reviews anywhere on your website using the HTML code. It helps highlight customer feedback and improve trust and credibility.

How can I begin using RatingE?

Getting started with RatingE is as easy as a breeze. Our support team will help you create your account. You can set your preferences and leave the rest to RatingE. We provide a free setup consultation to help you get started quickly.

What kind of support does RatingE offer?

We provide outright access to our online tutorial, which contains elaborate how-to guides and documents. You can also reach out to our support team in case of any doubts.

How secure is my data with RatingE?

RatingE is built with top-tier online tools, ensuring that your personal data is always
